task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Remote Work Policy' document in the 'HR-Workspace'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Remote Work Policy' document details or the contents of the 'HR-Workspace' with the document visible.

task_completion.description: Access the publishing interface for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publish' tab or publishing menu is active for the 'Remote Work Policy' document.

task_completion.description: Select 'HR-Intranet' as the destination for publication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A section tree or list is visible, and 'HR-Intranet' is highlighted, checked, or selected.

task_completion.description: Publish or update the document to the selected section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Publish', 'Republish', or 'Update' button, or a success notification appears confirming the publication.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'HR-Intranet' section contains Version 2.0 of the 'Remote Work Policy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'HR-Intranet' section contents or the published document's details, explicitly displaying 'Version 2.0' (or '2.0') for the 'Remote Work Policy'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in a web browser viewing the Nuxeo application, not via terminal commands (like curl) or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Platform 10.10 interface is visible, with standard navigation menus, document views, and publishing tabs.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the version number.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Inspector tab) are not open to manually edit the DOM text to '2.0'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating a document in Nuxeo Platform 10.10. Target section path: '/default-domain/sections/HR-Intranet'. Source document path: '/default-domain/workspaces/HR-Workspace/Remote-Work-Policy'. Document title: 'Remote Work Policy'. The expected final version label in the HR-Intranet section is '2.0'.
